scripts.build:win: node scripts/generate-icon.js && electron-vite build && node scripts/build.js nsis
scripts.build:portable: node scripts/generate-icon.js && electron-vite build && node scripts/build.js portable
scripts.release: node scripts/generate-icon.js && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish always
scripts.dev:web: cd web && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.build:web: cd web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.setup: npm install --ignore-scripts && node node_modules/electron/install.js && npx electron-builder install-app-deps
